CATEGORIZATION PERFORMANCE
================================
✅ Questions detected: How do I..., What tools..., When can..., Cost, Timeline
✅ Praise detected: Amazing, Inspiring, Love it, Great, Thank you
✅ Spam detected: Crypto, Bitcoin, MLM, "Work from home"
✅ Sales detected: Partnership, Collaboration, Sponsorship

AUTO-RESPONSE TEMPLATES (Active)
================================
1. how_to_start: "Great question! Start by watching our latest video..."
2. how_long: "Great question! Most people see initial results..."
3. what_tools: "We use a mix of free and paid tools..."
4. how_much: "The base setup is free, but most people invest..."
5. praise_positive: "Thank you so much! 🙏 Comments like this keep us going..."
6. praise_inspiring: "This is everything—thank you for sharing your win!..."

NEXT STEPS
================================
1. ⚠️ URGENT: Re-authenticate YouTube API
   - Run: python3 youtube-api-auth.py
   - Authorize in browser when prompted
   - Token will be valid for ~1 year

2. Monitor will auto-run every 30 minutes
   - Log: ~/.openclaw/workspace/.cache/youtube-comments.jsonl
   - State: ~/.openclaw/workspace/.cache/youtube-comment-state.json

3. View live comments:
   - tail -f ~/.openclaw/workspace/.cache/youtube-comments.jsonl

4. Check flagged sales comments:
   - grep '"category": "sales"' ~/.openclaw/workspace/.cache/youtube-comments.jsonl | jq .
